text.title: Multi-Machine Outsource Dev Env Bootstrap Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `content/01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a conclusion referencing a concrete rule id.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the engineer use >=2 machines + needs per-client isolation + <2h bootstrap?

branch.question: Is a single accountable owner named (not 'team' / 'we' / blank)?
Do all required inputs carry a declared type AND a source citation?

conclusion.verdict: proceed to content/04-procedure.xml; produce the artefact
reject inputs; request typed inputs from upstream before running the procedure
escalate-to-owner: assign a single accountable owner before producing any artefact
hand off to the named fallback / upstream methodology or stop
schedule-recompute: artefact is stale; trigger refresh cycle
